'''gahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earwards|earwards]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earwards|earwards]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gahate|gahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gahatesher|gahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahatesherĂ«m|gahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gahatero|gahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gahateshĂ«|gahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahateshĂ«m|gahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigahatero|gokigahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigahateshĂ«|gokigahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigahateshĂ«m|gokigahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogahankerom|gogahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogahankeshĂ«|gogahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogahankeshĂ«m|gogahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogahankeya|gogahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gahaterom|gahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahatemu|gahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gahateya|gahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigahaterom|gokigahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigahatemu|gokigahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigahateya|gokigahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gahahate|gahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gahahatesher|gahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahahatesherĂ«m|gahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gahahatero|gahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gahahateshĂ«|gahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahahateshĂ«m|gahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigahahatero|gokigahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigahahateshĂ«|gokigahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigahahateshĂ«m|gokigahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogahahankerom|gogahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogahahankeshĂ«|gogahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogahahankeshĂ«m|gogahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogahahankeya|gogahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gahahaterom|gahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gahahatemu|gahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gahahateya|gahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigahahaterom|gokigahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigahahatemu|gokigahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigahahateya|gokigahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠte|gĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠtesher|gĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠtero|gĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠhĂŠtero|gokigĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠterom|gĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠtemu|gĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠhĂŠteya|gĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠhĂŠterom|gokigĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠhĂŠteya|gokigĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafhafte|gafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafhaftesher|gafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafhaftesherĂ«m|gafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafhaftero|gafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafhafteshĂ«|gafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafhafteshĂ«m|gafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafhaftero|gokigafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafhafteshĂ«|gokigafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafhafteshĂ«m|gokigafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafhafnkerom|gogafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafhafnkeshĂ«|gogafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafhafnkeshĂ«m|gogafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafhafnkeya|gogafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafhafterom|gafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafhaftemu|gafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafhafteya|gafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafhafterom|gokigafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafhaftemu|gokigafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafhafteya|gokigafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
